title: Tufin - Get Application Information from SecureApp
content:
Search SecureApp by application name and retrieve basic application information and all application connections.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Tufin pack (Tufin, partner-supported).

Inputs — ApplicationName: Name of the application to query.

Outputs — Tufin.App.ID: Application ID; Tufin.App.Name: Application name; Tufin.App.Status: Application status; Tufin.App.Decommissioned: Is the application decommissioned; Tufin.App.OwnerID: Application owner ID; Tufin.App.OwnerName: Application owner name; Tufin.App.Comments: Application comments; Tufin.AppConnection.ID: Connection ID; Tufin.AppConnection.Name: Connection name; Tufin.AppConnection.AppID: Application ID.

Integrations/scripts used: tufin-search-application-connections, tufin-search-applications.
